about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Hyper-Local News for a Modern Digital India
about.missionDesc: To empower local communities by providing accurate, timely, and hyper-local news that directly impacts their daily lives.
about.storyContent: LocalNewz was born out of a simple realization: while global news is everywhere, the stories that truly matter—the once happening in our neighborhoods, our markets, and our community centers—often go untold. We built this platform to give a voice to the local narrative, powered by a network of dedicated journalists and community contributors.

values.integrityDesc: We stick to the facts and maintain the highest ethical standards in journalism.
values.communityDesc: We are driven by the needs and aspirations of the local people we serve.
values.accessibilityDesc: Information should be free, clear, and available to everyone, regardless of language.
